# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# look Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Zoo Entrance
#   You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the Willowbrook Family Zoo.
> look
# examine fence A tall wrought-iron fence with animal silhouettes.
> examine fence
# take fence iron fence is fixed in place.
> take fence
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# examine bench A sturdy park bench painted forest green. *DING DONG*
#   "Attention visitors! The Willowbrook Family Zoo will be closing in three
#   hours.
> examine bench
# examine flowers Tidy beds of marigolds and petunias.
> examine flowers
# take bench park bench is fixed in place.
> take bench
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# examine hay bale A large round bale of golden hay.
> examine hay bale
# take hay bale hay bale is fixed in place. *DING DONG* "Attention visitors!
#   Two hours until closing.
> take hay bale
# examine rabbits A pair of Holland Lop rabbits with floppy ears.
> examine rabbits
# west Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> west
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# examine parrots A raucous flock of scarlet macaws and grey African parrots.
> examine parrots
# examine waterfall A gentle artificial waterfall cascading into a stone
#   basin. *DING DONG* "Attention visitors! One hour until closing.
> examine waterfall
# take waterfall waterfall is fixed in place.
> take waterfall
# examine perches Thick sisal ropes strung between wooden posts.
> examine perches
